type_definitions.name: FsAdrFileAdapter
type_definitions.description: Filesystem adapter implementing the AdrFilePort secondary port. Walks knowledge/adr/*.md on the real filesystem; reads file contents and calls parse_adr_frontmatter to YAML-parse the string into domain AdrFrontMatter objects. Encapsulates both I/O and parsing so the usecase layer receives domain objects directly (CN-05). Follows the existing Fs-prefix adapter naming convention (FsTrackStore, FsCatalogueLoader, FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore). Holds only the ADR directory path — parsing is delegated to the parse_adr_frontmatter free function (no codec struct field needed). The CLI match arm for verify adr-signals constructs FsAdrFileAdapter + VerifyAdrSignalsInteractor directly in verify.rs following the established pattern (no interposing composition struct), consistent with all other verify subcommands (TechStack, LatestTrack, ArchDocs, etc.).

informal_grounds.summary: CLI composition pattern clarified: verify.rs match arm constructs FsAdrFileAdapter + VerifyAdrSignalsInteractor directly, with no interposing AdrSignalsVerifyAdapter struct. The previously drafted AdrSignalsVerifyAdapter entry had no precedent in the verify module family and has been removed from this catalogue. This note is embedded in FsAdrFileAdapter so the impl-plan reviewer is aware of the wiring pattern.

type_definitions.name: parse_adr_frontmatter
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure free function that parses the raw content of an ADR Markdown file into a domain AdrFrontMatter value object. Uses the existing parse_yaml_frontmatter utility (infrastructure::verify::frontmatter module) to extract the YAML block, then uses serde_yaml to deserialize into AdrFrontMatterDto. For each AdrDecisionDto, dispatches on status: String to construct the correct domain typestate struct and wraps it in the matching AdrDecisionEntry variant (ProposedDecision | AcceptedDecision | ImplementedDecision | SupersededDecision | DeprecatedDecision). State-specific fields (implemented_in into ImplementedDecision, superseded_by into SupersededDecision) are passed at construction; AdrDecisionCommon is built from shared grounds fields. Status strings that do not match a known variant surface as AdrFrontMatterCodecError::InvalidDecisionField. Enforces explicit-key-presence detection via a serde_yaml::Value intermediate pass before typed DTO deserialization: (a) forbidden-when-key-present — 'implemented_in' key present on any status other than 'implemented' → InvalidDecisionField; 'superseded_by' key present on any status other than 'superseded' → InvalidDecisionField. (b) required-when-value — status 'implemented' requires implemented_in: Some(_), status 'superseded' requires superseded_by: Some(_). serde(deny_unknown_fields) on AdrDecisionDto rejects unknown schema fields. serde derives live in infrastructure, not domain (CN-05). free_function kind: the parsing logic is stateless (no struct state is threaded through; the function takes a string and returns a Result). Precedent: parse_yaml_frontmatter in the same infrastructure::verify::frontmatter module is also a stateless free function. A zero-field codec struct would add no value over a free function here.

informal_grounds.summary: Redesigned from value_object AdrFrontMatterCodec (zero-field struct) to free_function parse_adr_frontmatter. The existing codebase precedent is parse_yaml_frontmatter in infrastructure::verify::frontmatter — a stateless free function, not a struct. A zero-field parsing struct has no state to protect and stretches value_object semantics (validated value container). free_function kind accurately exposes expected_params / expected_returns in the contract-map. FsAdrFileAdapter no longer holds a codec field — it calls parse_adr_frontmatter directly.

type_definitions.name: AdrFrontMatterCodecError
type_definitions.description: Error type for YAML front-matter parse failures within parse_adr_frontmatter. YamlParse wraps serde_yaml errors; MissingAdrId covers missing required adr_id field; InvalidDecisionField covers per-decision field validation failures (unknown status string, forbidden-when-key-present violations, required-when-value violations). Infrastructure-layer concern — does not propagate serde types into domain.

type_definitions.name: AdrFrontMatterDto
type_definitions.description: Serde-derived DTO mirroring the YAML front-matter schema (adr_id + decisions[] array). Used as the intermediate deserialization target inside parse_adr_frontmatter before converting to domain AdrFrontMatter value object. serde(deny_unknown_fields) to fail on schema drift. Infrastructure-only — never exported to domain or usecase layers.

type_definitions.name: AdrDecisionDto
type_definitions.description: Serde-derived DTO for a single element of the decisions[] array. Covers all schema fields from D3: id (required), user_decision_ref (Option), review_finding_ref (Option), candidate_selection (Option), status (required String — validated and dispatched to AdrDecisionEntry variant by parse_adr_frontmatter), superseded_by (Option<String>, required when status is 'superseded'), implemented_in (Option<String>, required when status is 'implemented'), grandfathered (Option<bool>, defaults to false). Note: serde Option<String> cannot distinguish 'key: null' from 'key absent'; parse_adr_frontmatter performs an explicit-key-presence check on the raw serde_yaml::Value before deserializing this DTO, so that 'implemented_in: null' on a non-'implemented' status is caught as InvalidDecisionField before reaching this struct. Unknown status values surface as AdrFrontMatterCodecError::InvalidDecisionField; misplaced state-specific fields (implemented_in key present on non-'implemented' status, superseded_by key present on non-'superseded' status) also surface as InvalidDecisionField via the key-presence pre-check to uphold the typestate invariant. Infrastructure-only — never exported to domain or usecase layers.
